trigger_eval.method: manual prediction (HOUSECARL_SKILL_AUTHORING.md §6.5 fallback; empirical run_loop needs a non-Windows host, session is Windows 11)
trigger_eval.followup: Flagged for empirical run_loop re-validation on a non-Windows host + one independent peer prediction check (§6.5 items 3-4). Tracked in STATE.md Phase-2 notes.

round_trip.method: Blind live-analogy derivation: predict REQ_Heavy_Ebony_Hands (013962) from comparables ONLY (Ebony Cuirass 013961 for the material spine + the per-part gauntlet ratio 0.30 + the heavy-gauntlet fist-perk rule), without reading the target first; then diff against the houseCARL winner.

predicted.resist_tempering: none in source (Reqtificator assigns ebonySmithing tempering; no ranged-resist, gauntlets are not the cuirass)

actual.resist_tempering: absent in source winner; chain Skyrim.esm -> Requiem.esp

round_trip.notes: Exact match on AR/Value/Weight and the full keyword set. The per-part ratio (0.30 on AR, value, AND weight off the cuirass) reproduced all three exactly (500->150, 5000->1500, 40->12). The heavy-gauntlet fist-perk prediction was correct (PerkFistsEbony 02C178 present).

round_trip.method: Blind live-analogy derivation: predict REQ_Light_Dragonscale_Hands (01393F) from the Dragonscale Cuirass 01393E + the gauntlet ratio 0.30 + the light-gauntlet rule (no fist perk), then diff against the winner. Chosen to contrast the heavy/light fist-perk split.

predicted.fist_perk: none (light gauntlets carry no PerkFists keyword)

round_trip.notes: Exact match on AR/Value/Weight (300->90, 8000->2400, 15->4.5 at ratio 0.30) and the core keyword set; the only delta is the incidental Survival_ArmorWarm climate tag (copy from comparable, not balance-relevant). Confirms light gauntlets get NO fist perk -- the case that proves the heavy-only fist-perk rule.
